mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", order_number as "orderNumber", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", customer_email as "customerEmail", seller_id as "sellerId", seller_name as "sellerName", dispute_type as "disputeType", reason, disputed_amount as "disputedAmount", priority, assigned_to as "assignedTo", customer_complaint as "customerComplaint", seller_response as "sellerResponse", evidence_links as "evidenceLinks", investigator_id as "investigatorId", investigation_notes as "investigationNotes", resolution_outcome as "resolution", resolution_notes as "resolutionNotes", resolution_date as "resolutionDate", refund_amount as "refundAmount", sla_target_days as "slaTargetDays", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.disputes_flat WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.disputes_flat GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", order_number as "orderNumber", customer_name as "customerName", seller_name as "sellerName", dispute_type as "disputeType", reason, disputed_amount as "disputedAmount", priority, assigned_to as "assignedTo", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.disputes_flat WHERE priority = #{priority} AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", order_number as "orderNumber", customer_name as "customerName", seller_name as "sellerName", dispute_type as "disputeType", reason, disputed_amount as "disputedAmount", priority, assigned_to as "assignedTo", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.disputes_flat WHERE state_id NOT IN ('RESOLVED', 'CLOSED', 'WITHDRAWN') AND assigned_to = #{assignedTo} ${orderby} ${pagination}
